## Checklist

- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes (with `-race`)
- [ ] `go mod tidy` leaves `go.mod`/`go.sum` unchanged
- [ ] Added/updated tests, including negative cases for any new audit rule
- [ ] Updated docs (README / SECURITY) if behavior changed
- [ ] No real secrets, tokens, or internal hostnames in code, tests, or fixtures
